item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: The Trick To Eating Pineapple Is To Eat It Before It Eats You
item.description: Pinapple has a natural enzyme that eats away at human flesh. The trick is to eat it before it eats you. No surprise this would also kill parasites. The enzyme is called bromelain. Pineapple is one of the few fruits that eats you while you eat it. It's not specific to human flesh, it breaks down proteins. Kiwi fruit contain a different enzyme, actinidain, but I think it also has bromelain. (Someone can confirm) But they’re pretty similar. This is because pineapples are slightly carnivorous plants: If an insect walks in between the pineapple leaves, the ones you see on top of the pineapples you buy at the store, and gets stuck, it will be dissolved and "eaten" by the pineapple. If you keep a piece of raw pineapple against your inner cheek or gum, you will get a sore. Your flesh has been eaten away. Damn nature, you scary.
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant
